title: cast
wikitext:
[]: cast             Quote Post by Hand of God » Sun Sep 04, 2005 11:40 pm do you guys have any pics of the cast of eva in english and spanish?

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Mon Sep 05, 2005 1:04 am you can find a good few of the english ones at the neon genesis evangelion series page on animenewsnetwork.com.

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Sep 05, 2005 1:38 pm I checked there, and they don't have a picture of the English voice of Kaji, Aaron Krohn. Now listening to the commentary on "Asuka Strikes!" with Tiffany Grant and (if I remember correctly) Amanda Win Lee, I've heard that Kaji's voice actor is really hot. Since we're talking about pictures of voice actors: http://www.caesaronbroadway.com/images/headshots/aaronkrohn.jpg <-- is that him, or just another Aaron Krohn? I'm just curious. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Toilet Duck » Mon Sep 05, 2005 1:45 pm sachiel wrote: I checked there, and they don't have a picture of the English voice of Kaji, Aaron Krohn. Now listening to the commentary on "Asuka Strikes!" with Tiffany Grant and (if I remember correctly) Amanda Win Lee, I've heard that Kaji's voice actor is really hot. Since we're talking about pictures of voice actors: http://www.caesaronbroadway.com/images/headshots/aaronkrohn.jpg <-- is that him, or just another Aaron Krohn? I'm just curious. XD

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Mon Sep 05, 2005 2:35 pm XD Yeah I know, I was just curious. Haha. I did Google his name, got that picture I posted the link to. Still not sure if it's the right guy, because it listed things he's been in, and it said nothing about anime or Eva, or voice-acting at all. It could be just another Aaron Krohn.
summary:
